name: reviewer-affiliation cache returns a fresh entry without refetching when its age is below the cache TTL
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/affiliation-cache && printf '{"login":"bob","org":"b","fetched_at":"2026-05-12T22:00:00Z"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/affiliation-cache/bob.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/affiliation-lookup.sh" --login bob --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --cache-ttl-hours 24 2>out.txt && grep -q 'cache_status=fresh' out.txt && grep -q 'refreshed=false' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
